arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher has Man City 115 charges transfer theory as Liverpool get timeline update
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has questioned whether Manchester City's January transfer business is a result of an impending transfer ban amid the wait for news from their ongoing legal battle with the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Al-Hilal confirm Mohamed Salah interest: Is Liverpool forward heading for Saudi Pro League?
arts.sum: Al-Hilal head coach Jorge Jesus confirms that he wants Liverpool attacker Mohamed Salah at the club next season.

arts.ttl: Barcelona eye Liverpool’s star winger in sensational summer move
arts.sum: Now, according to Sport, he is considered a viable option for the Catalan team, although the Colombian is not their top choice . For Barcelona’s sporting director Deco, Luis Díaz is among the preferred options .

arts.ttl: Gary Neville and ex-Man Utd star in disagreement as Liverpool's Alisson snubbed all round
arts.sum: Gary Neville and former Manchester United team-mate Ben Foster have expressed very different views on who the best goalkeeper in the Premier League is right now

arts.ttl: Everton sponsor leaves UK after porn ad probe
arts.sum: Gambling site Stake will leave the UK as a regulator investigation continues.

arts.ttl: Is Everton vs Liverpool on TV tonight? TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time
arts.sum: Everton and Liverpool collide in the Premier League on Wednesday night in the final Merseyside Derby to be played at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: There is obvious Everton vs Liverpool scoreline as Merseyside derby trend emerges
arts.sum: The Merseyside derby in stats as Everton prepare to host Liverpool for the final time at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: David Moyes can provide perfect Merseyside derby reminder as Everton parallels clear
arts.sum: David Moyes took charge of his first Merseyside derby in 2003 and there are clear parallels between the situation the team finds itself in then and now

arts.ttl: A shiny new stadium awaits Everton but the Merseyside derby will never be the same again... DOMINIC KING looks back on his Goodison derby day memories
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING: Yes, a shiny, new stadium standing proudly on the banks of the Mersey awaits Everton but the thought of a Derby not at Goodison Park or Anfield is difficult to comprehend.

arts.ttl: How to watch Everton v Liverpool on TV tonight - channel and kick-off time
arts.sum: The 245th Merseyside derby was postponed in December due to bad weather, but Everton and Liverpool will finally go head-to-head at Goodison Park on Wednesday night
